scripts.dev:tunnel: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../.env.local; set +a; if [ -z "$CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API" ]; then echo "Missing CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API"; exit 1; fi; cloudflared tunnel run --token "$CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API"'
scripts.build: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @chris-test/fcp build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/db build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/graph-db build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/graph build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/graph-ingest build && pnpm --filter api run build:local
scripts.deploy:cf: sh -c 'COMMIT_SHA=${WORKERS_CI_COMMIT_SHA:-$(git rev-parse HEAD)}; API_VERSION=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | sed -nE "s/.*fide-api\/v([0-9A-Za-z.+-]+).*/\1/p" | head -n1); if [ -z "$API_VERSION" ]; then git fetch --tags --force --quiet || true; API_VERSION=$(git tag --points-at HEAD | grep -E "^fide-api/v" | head -n1 | sed "s#^fide-api/v##"); fi; if [ -z "$API_VERSION" ]; then echo "Missing API version: commit message must include fide-api/v* or tag must point at HEAD"; exit 1; fi; pnpm exec wrangler deploy --var COMMIT_SHA:$COMMIT_SHA --var API_VERSION:$API_VERSION'
scripts.deploy:cf:dry-run: sh -c 'COMMIT_SHA=${WORKERS_CI_COMMIT_SHA:-$(git rev-parse HEAD)}; API_VERSION=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | sed -nE "s/.*fide-api\/v([0-9A-Za-z.+-]+).*/\1/p" | head -n1); if [ -z "$API_VERSION" ]; then git fetch --tags --force --quiet || true; API_VERSION=$(git tag --points-at HEAD | grep -E "^fide-api/v" | head -n1 | sed "s#^fide-api/v##"); fi; if [ -z "$API_VERSION" ]; then echo "Missing API version: commit message must include fide-api/v* or tag must point at HEAD"; exit 1; fi; pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --var COMMIT_SHA:$COMMIT_SHA --var API_VERSION:$API_VERSION'
